headline: WTW completes acquisition of Cushon, consolidating its position as 4th largest master trust provider in the U.K.
summary: LONDON, May 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- WTW (NASDAQ:WTW), a leading global advisory, broking and solutions company today announced it has completed the acquisition of the workplace pension and savings provider Cushon, following regulatory approval from the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA). The transaction strengthens WTW’s position in the U.K. defined contribution (DC) workplace pensions market, where its LifeSight master trust is the fourth largest.
